model_comparison: The user's core requirement was to control the 'Pace' of the speech, specifically requesting a slow pace. Model 2 successfully executed the command, delivering the text with a very slow, deliberate, and clear pace. Model 2 followed the instruction perfectly regarding the feature dimension.
